ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizing_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing chart */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the sizing chart applies (e.g., DK/DE/SE/NL/AT) */,
  "garment_type" TEXT /* Type of garment the sizing chart is for (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sizing chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the sizing chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the sizing chart */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sizing chart (e.g., active, inactive, draft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_categories" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sizing chart the size category belongs to */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size category (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the size category */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order in which the sizes should be displayed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_categories_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES sizing_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., CHEST, WAIST, SEAT, SHOUDER LENGTH) */,
  "value_cm" REAL /* Value of the measurement in centimeters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code for the language (e.g., en, fr, de) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the language was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the language */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the language is the default language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code for the currency (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the currency was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the currency */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the currency is the default currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the currency (e.g., $, €, £) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the product is active */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the size belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category the product size belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the product size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size in stock */,
  "is_out_of_stock" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the product size is out of stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language the customer prefers */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency the customer prefers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "favorite_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's favorite size */,
  "favorite_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's favorite category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_favorite_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("favorite_size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_favorite_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("favorite_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred size */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)
